Example 2: Configuration Hot-Reload & Environment Updates (Zero-Downtime Deployment)

Update Django configuration files in running containers for environment-specific settings modifications without service restart - supporting User authentication backends, JobPost search configurations, Skills API endpoints, Author profile settings, and Location geocoding parameters for production tuning.

# Update production settings
docker compose cp ./config/production_settings.py web:/app/anihpj/settings/

# Copy updated environment variables
docker compose cp ./.env.production web:/app/

# Update nginx configuration
docker compose cp ./nginx/nginx.conf nginx:/etc/nginx/

# Reload configuration without restart
docker compose exec web python manage.py reload_config
docker compose exec nginx nginx -s reload

Django Models Context & Configuration Management:

# Configuration hot-reload for Django anihpj production environment
# Updating User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location model configurations

import os
import shutil
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Dict, Any

# Configuration update context
config_update = {
    "deployment_id": "config_update_2026_01_12_v3",
    "update_time": "2026-01-12 16:00:00",
    "strategy": "zero_downtime_hot_reload",
    "affected_services": ["web", "worker", "nginx"],
    "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"]
}

# Updated configuration files
updated_configs = {
    "production_settings": {
        "source": "./config/production_settings.py",
        "destination": "web:/app/anihpj/settings/production.py",
        "changes": {
            "User_authentication": {
                "LDAP_TIMEOUT": "10s → 30s",
                "SESSION_COOKIE_AGE": "3600 → 7200",
                "PASSWORD_RESET_TIMEOUT": "900 → 1800",
                "rationale": "Reduce timeout errors for enterprise users"
            },
            "JobPost_search": {
                "ELASTICSEARCH_TIMEOUT": "5s → 15s",
                "SEARCH_RESULTS_PER_PAGE": "20 → 50",
                "AUTOCOMPLETE_MIN_CHARS": "3 → 2",
                "rationale": "Improve search performance and user experience"
            },
            "Skills_verification": {
                "API_RATE_LIMIT": "100/min → 200/min",
                "CACHE_TTL": "300s → 600s",
                "VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT": "10s → 20s",
                "rationale": "Handle increased verification demand"
            },
            "Author_profiles": {
                "MEDIA_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE": "5MB → 10MB",
                "PORTFOLIO_IMAGE_QUALITY": "80 → 90",
                "PROFILE_CACHE_TTL": "600s → 1800s",
                "rationale": "Support high-quality portfolio content"
            },
            "Location_geocoding": {
                "GEOCODING_API_TIMEOUT": "5s → 10s",
                "LOCATION_CACHE_TTL": "3600s → 7200s",
                "MAX_RADIUS_SEARCH_KM": "50 → 100",
                "rationale": "Improve location search coverage"
            }
        },
        "validation": "syntax_checked",
        "backup_created": True
    },
    "environment_variables": {
        "source": "./.env.production",
        "destination": "web:/app/.env",
        "critical_updates": {
            "DATABASE_MAX_CONNECTIONS": "50 → 100",
            "REDIS_CACHE_MEMORY": "512MB → 1GB",
            "CELERY_WORKER_CONCURRENCY": "4 → 8",
            "GUNICORN_WORKERS": "4 → 8"
        }
    },
    "nginx_config": {
        "source": "./nginx/nginx.conf",
        "destination": "nginx:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf",
        "optimizations": {
            "client_max_body_size": "5m → 10m",
            "keepalive_timeout": "65s → 120s",
            "gzip_compression": "enabled for static assets",
            "rate_limiting": "10r/s → 20r/s per IP"
        }
    }
}

# Configuration reload results
reload_results = {
    "web_service": {
        "reload_method": "python manage.py reload_config",
        "reload_time": "2.3s",
        "status": "success",
        "models_reinitialized": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "connections_maintained": True,
        "downtime": "0s"
    },
    "nginx_service": {
        "reload_method": "nginx -s reload",
        "reload_time": "0.8s",
        "status": "success",
        "active_connections_preserved": 1247,
        "downtime": "0s"
    },
    "worker_service": {
        "reload_method": "celery reload",
        "reload_time": "5.1s",
        "status": "success",
        "tasks_in_progress_preserved": 23,
        "downtime": "0s"
    }
}

# Performance impact analysis
performance_impact = {
    "User_model": {
        "authentication_success_rate": "92.3% → 98.7%",
        "session_timeout_errors": "-67%",
        "avg_login_time": "1.2s → 0.9s"
    },
    "JobPost_model": {
        "search_response_time": "850ms → 420ms",
        "search_timeout_errors": "-89%",
        "results_per_page": "20 → 50 (improved UX)"
    },
    "Skills_model": {
        "verification_success_rate": "88.5% → 97.2%",
        "api_timeout_errors": "-91%",
        "cache_hit_rate": "65% → 82%"
    },
    "Author_model": {
        "portfolio_upload_success": "93.1% → 99.4%",
        "image_quality_score": "8.0 → 9.0",
        "profile_load_time": "1.8s → 0.6s"
    },
    "Location_model": {
        "geocoding_success_rate": "91.7% → 98.9%",
        "search_radius_coverage": "50km → 100km",
        "cache_hit_rate": "72% → 88%"
    }
}

# Print configuration update summary
print("Django Configuration Hot-Reload - Zero-Downtime Update:")
print("=" * 55)
print(f"Deployment ID: {config_update['deployment_id']}")
print(f"Strategy: {config_update['strategy'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")

print(f"\n📝 Configuration Updates Applied:")
for config_type, details in updated_configs.items():
    print(f"\n   {config_type.replace('_', ' ').title()}:")
    if config_type == "production_settings":
        for model, changes in details['changes'].items():
            model_name = model.replace('_', ' ').title()
            print(f"   • {model_name}:")
            for key, value in changes.items():
                if key != "rationale":
                    print(f"      - {key}: {value}")

print(f"\n🔄 Service Reload Results:")
for service, result in reload_results.items():
    print(f"   {service.replace('_', ' ').title()}:")
    print(f"      Reload Time: {result['reload_time']}")
    print(f"      Status: {result['status'].upper()}")
    print(f"      Downtime: {result['downtime']}")

print(f"\n📊 Performance Impact:")
for model, impact in performance_impact.items():
    print(f"   {model.replace('_', ' ')}:")
    for metric, value in impact.items():
        print(f"      • {metric.replace('_', ' ').title()}: {value}")

print(f"\n✅ Update Summary:")
print(f"   🚀 All configurations updated successfully")
print(f"   ⚡ Zero downtime achieved (0s)")
print(f"   📊 All 5 Django models performance improved")
print(f"   🔧 3 services reloaded without interruption")
print(f"   ✨ Production optimization complete")
Successfully copied ./config/production_settings.py to web:/app/anihpj/settings/
Successfully copied ./.env.production to web:/app/.env
Successfully copied ./nginx/nginx.conf to nginx:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf

Configuration reloaded: anihpj.settings.production
Active connections preserved: 1247
Worker tasks preserved: 23

Django Configuration Hot-Reload - Zero-Downtime Update:
=======================================================
Deployment ID: config_update_2026_01_12_v3
Strategy: Zero Downtime Hot Reload

📝 Configuration Updates Applied:
   Production Settings:
   • User Authentication:
      - LDAP_TIMEOUT: 10s → 30s
      - SESSION_COOKIE_AGE: 3600 → 7200
      - PASSWORD_RESET_TIMEOUT: 900 → 1800
   • Jobpost Search:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_TIMEOUT: 5s → 15s
      - SEARCH_RESULTS_PER_PAGE: 20 → 50
      - AUTOCOMPLETE_MIN_CHARS: 3 → 2
   • Skills Verification:
      - API_RATE_LIMIT: 100/min → 200/min
      - CACHE_TTL: 300s → 600s
      - VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT: 10s → 20s

🔄 Service Reload Results:
   Web Service:
      Reload Time: 2.3s
      Status: SUCCESS
      Downtime: 0s
   Nginx Service:
      Reload Time: 0.8s
      Status: SUCCESS
      Downtime: 0s

📊 Performance Impact:
   User Model:
      • Authentication Success Rate: 92.3% → 98.7%
      • Session Timeout Errors: -67%
      • Avg Login Time: 1.2s → 0.9s
   Jobpost Model:
      • Search Response Time: 850ms → 420ms
      • Search Timeout Errors: -89%
      • Results Per Page: 20 → 50 (improved UX)

✅ Update Summary:
   🚀 All configurations updated successfully
   ⚡ Zero downtime achieved (0s)
   📊 All 5 Django models performance improved
   🔧 3 services reloaded without interruption
   ✨ Production optimization complete
Example 3: Database Backup & Media Files Export (Disaster Recovery)

Extract complete database dumps and media file collections from production containers for disaster recovery preparation - backing up User accounts, JobPost listings, Skills certifications, Author portfolios, and Location geodata with comprehensive off-site storage for business continuity.

# Create and extract database backup
docker compose exec db pg_dump -U anihpj_user anihpj_db > /tmp/backup.sql
docker compose cp db:/tmp/backup.sql ./backups/db_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql

# Export media files
docker compose cp web:/app/media/ ./backups/media_$(date +%Y%m%d)/

# Export static files
docker compose cp web:/app/static/ ./backups/static_$(date +%Y%m%d)/

# Export user uploads
docker compose cp web:/app/media/uploads/ ./backups/uploads_$(date +%Y%m%d)/

# Verify backup integrity
ls -lh ./backups/ && du -sh ./backups/*

Django Models Context & Disaster Recovery:

# Disaster recovery backup for Django anihpj production
# Complete data extraction: User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location

import os
import hashlib
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Dict, List

# Backup operation context
backup_operation = {
    "backup_id": "DR_BACKUP_2026_01_12_WEEKLY",
    "backup_time": "2026-01-12 03:00:00",
    "backup_type": "full_disaster_recovery",
    "schedule": "weekly_automated",
    "retention_days": 90
}

# Database backup details
database_backup = {
    "backup_file": "db_20260112_030000.sql",
    "backup_size": "4.7GB",
    "compression": "gzip",
    "compressed_size": "892MB",
    "backup_duration": "18m 34s",
    "model_data_included": {
        "User_model": {
            "table": "auth_user",
            "records": 45678,
            "size": "234MB",
            "includes": ["accounts", "profiles", "sessions", "auth_tokens"],
            "sensitive_data": ["passwords_hashed", "email_encrypted"]
        },
        "JobPost_model": {
            "table": "jobpost_jobpost",
            "records": 123456,
            "size": "1.8GB",
            "includes": ["job_listings", "applications", "reviews", "analytics"],
            "related_tables": ["jobpost_application", "jobpost_review"]
        },
        "Skills_model": {
            "table": "jobpost_skills",
            "records": 8976,
            "size": "145MB",
            "includes": ["skill_definitions", "certifications", "endorsements", "demand_metrics"],
            "related_tables": ["skills_certification", "skills_endorsement"]
        },
        "Author_model": {
            "table": "jobpost_author",
            "records": 5432,
            "size": "378MB",
            "includes": ["author_profiles", "portfolios", "work_history", "ratings"],
            "related_tables": ["author_portfolio", "author_project"]
        },
        "Location_model": {
            "table": "jobpost_location",
            "records": 34567,
            "size": "456MB",
            "includes": ["locations", "coordinates", "market_data", "demographics"],
            "postgis_data": "geographic_coordinates_indexed"
        }
    },
    "indexes_included": True,
    "constraints_included": True,
    "sequences_included": True,
    "checksum": "sha256:a1b2c3d4e5f6..."
}

# Media files backup
media_backup = {
    "backup_directory": "media_20260112",
    "total_size": "23.4GB",
    "total_files": 156789,
    "backup_duration": "42m 18s",
    "subdirectories": {
        "user_avatars": {
            "path": "media/avatars/",
            "files": 45678,
            "size": "3.2GB",
            "model": "User",
            "description": "User profile pictures and avatars"
        },
        "author_portfolios": {
            "path": "media/portfolios/",
            "files": 12345,
            "size": "8.9GB",
            "model": "Author",
            "description": "Author portfolio images and documents"
        },
        "skills_certifications": {
            "path": "media/certifications/",
            "files": 8976,
            "size": "2.1GB",
            "model": "Skills",
            "description": "Skill certification documents and badges"
        },
        "jobpost_attachments": {
            "path": "media/job_attachments/",
            "files": 23456,
            "size": "4.7GB",
            "model": "JobPost",
            "description": "Job post attachments and documents"
        },
        "company_logos": {
            "path": "media/company_logos/",
            "files": 3456,
            "size": "567MB",
            "model": "JobPost",
            "description": "Company logos for job listings"
        },
        "location_images": {
            "path": "media/location_images/",
            "files": 5678,
            "size": "3.9GB",
            "model": "Location",
            "description": "Location photos and maps"
        }
    },
    "integrity_check": "md5_checksums_generated"
}

# Static files backup
static_backup = {
    "backup_directory": "static_20260112",
    "total_size": "1.2GB",
    "total_files": 5432,
    "includes": ["css", "js", "admin_files", "vendor_libraries"],
    "cdn_ready": True
}

# Backup verification and storage
backup_storage = {
    "primary_storage": {
        "location": "local_backup_server",
        "path": "./backups/",
        "total_size": "29.3GB",
        "available_space": "2.3TB",
        "status": "complete"
    },
    "offsite_storage": {
        "location": "aws_s3",
        "bucket": "anihpj-disaster-recovery",
        "region": "us-east-1",
        "storage_class": "GLACIER_DEEP_ARCHIVE",
        "upload_status": "in_progress",
        "estimated_completion": "2h 15m"
    },
    "backup_encryption": {
        "algorithm": "AES-256",
        "key_management": "AWS_KMS",
        "encrypted": True
    }
}

# Recovery readiness assessment
recovery_readiness = {
    "database_recovery": {
        "estimated_time": "25 minutes",
        "steps": ["restore_database", "rebuild_indexes", "verify_integrity"],
        "tested": True,
        "last_test": "2026-01-05"
    },
    "media_recovery": {
        "estimated_time": "1.5 hours",
        "steps": ["restore_media_files", "verify_checksums", "set_permissions"],
        "tested": True,
        "last_test": "2026-01-05"
    },
    "complete_recovery": {
        "estimated_time": "2 hours",
        "rto": "4 hours",  # Recovery Time Objective
        "rpo": "24 hours",  # Recovery Point Objective
        "confidence": "high"
    }
}

# Print disaster recovery backup summary
print("Django Disaster Recovery Backup - Complete Data Extraction:")
print("=" * 62)
print(f"Backup ID: {backup_operation['backup_id']}")
print(f"Backup Time: {backup_operation['backup_time']}")
print(f"Type: {backup_operation['backup_type'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")

print(f"\n💾 Database Backup:")
print(f"   File: {database_backup['backup_file']}")
print(f"   Size: {database_backup['backup_size']} (compressed: {database_backup['compressed_size']})")
print(f"   Duration: {database_backup['backup_duration']}")

print(f"\n   Model Data Included:")
for model, details in database_backup['model_data_included'].items():
    print(f"   • {model.replace('_', ' ')}:")
    print(f"      Records: {details['records']:,}")
    print(f"      Size: {details['size']}")
    print(f"      Table: {details['table']}")

print(f"\n📁 Media Files Backup:")
print(f"   Directory: {media_backup['backup_directory']}")
print(f"   Total Size: {media_backup['total_size']}")
print(f"   Total Files: {media_backup['total_files']:,}")
print(f"   Duration: {media_backup['backup_duration']}")

print(f"\n   Subdirectories:")
for subdir, details in media_backup['subdirectories'].items():
    print(f"   • {subdir.replace('_', ' ').title()}:")
    print(f"      Files: {details['files']:,} | Size: {details['size']}")
    print(f"      Model: {details['model']}")

print(f"\n🎨 Static Files Backup:")
print(f"   Size: {static_backup['total_size']}")
print(f"   Files: {static_backup['total_files']:,}")
print(f"   CDN Ready: {static_backup['cdn_ready']}")

print(f"\n☁️ Backup Storage:")
print(f"   Primary: {backup_storage['primary_storage']['location']} ({backup_storage['primary_storage']['total_size']})")
print(f"   Offsite: {backup_storage['offsite_storage']['location']} → {backup_storage['offsite_storage']['bucket']}")
print(f"   Encryption: {backup_storage['backup_encryption']['algorithm']}")

print(f"\n🔄 Recovery Readiness:")
print(f"   Database Recovery Time: {recovery_readiness['database_recovery']['estimated_time']}")
print(f"   Media Recovery Time: {recovery_readiness['media_recovery']['estimated_time']}")
print(f"   Complete Recovery Time: {recovery_readiness['complete_recovery']['estimated_time']}")
print(f"   RTO: {recovery_readiness['complete_recovery']['rto']} | RPO: {recovery_readiness['complete_recovery']['rpo']}")

print(f"\n✅ Disaster Recovery Summary:")
print(f"   💾 Database: 4.7GB (5 models, 218,109 records)")
print(f"   📁 Media: 23.4GB (156,789 files)")
print(f"   🎨 Static: 1.2GB (5,432 files)")
print(f"   ☁️ Total: 29.3GB backed up successfully")
print(f"   🔒 Encrypted and stored offsite")
print(f"   ✨ Recovery tested and verified")

Successfully copied to: ./backups/db_20260112_030000.sql
Successfully copied media to: ./backups/media_20260112/ (23.4GB)
Successfully copied static to: ./backups/static_20260112/ (1.2GB)

✓ Database checksum: VALID
✓ Media files: 156,789 files verified
✓ Static files: 5,432 files verified

Example 4: Development Testing & File Injection (Rapid Prototyping)

Inject test data, mock configurations, and development fixtures into running containers for rapid testing workflows - adding User test accounts, JobPost sample listings, Skills test certifications, Author demo portfolios, and Location test data without full rebuild cycles.

# Inject test fixtures
docker compose cp ./fixtures/test_users.json web:/app/fixtures/
docker compose cp ./fixtures/test_jobposts.json web:/app/fixtures/
docker compose cp ./fixtures/test_skills.json web:/app/fixtures/

# Load fixtures into database
docker compose exec web python manage.py loaddata /app/fixtures/test_users.json
docker compose exec web python manage.py loaddata /app/fixtures/test_jobposts.json

# Copy mock configuration for testing
docker compose cp ./test_config/settings_test.py web:/app/anihpj/settings/

# Inject test media files
docker compose cp ./test_media/sample_avatars/ web:/app/media/avatars/
docker compose cp ./test_media/sample_portfolios/ web:/app/media/portfolios/

# Verify test data loaded
docker compose exec web python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth.models import User; print(f'Users: {User.objects.count()}')"

Django Models Context & Testing Workflow:

# Development testing and rapid prototyping for Django anihpj
# Injecting test data: User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location

from datetime import datetime
from typing import Dict, List

# Test data injection context
test_injection = {
    "test_session_id": "DEV_TEST_SESSION_2026_01_12_001",
    "injection_time": "2026-01-12 14:30:00",
    "purpose": "rapid_prototyping_and_integration_testing",
    "environment": "development",
    "models_tested": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"]
}

# Test fixtures injected
injected_fixtures = {
    "test_users": {
        "fixture_file": "test_users.json",
        "source": "./fixtures/test_users.json",
        "destination": "web:/app/fixtures/test_users.json",
        "records": 50,
        "test_scenarios": {
            "regular_users": 30,
            "premium_users": 10,
            "admin_users": 5,
            "suspended_users": 3,
            "unverified_users": 2
        },
        "includes": ["auth_credentials", "profiles", "permissions", "test_sessions"],
        "password": "test123_all_users"
    },
    "test_jobposts": {
        "fixture_file": "test_jobposts.json",
        "source": "./fixtures/test_jobposts.json",
        "destination": "web:/app/fixtures/test_jobposts.json",
        "records": 200,
        "job_types": {
            "full_time": 120,
            "part_time": 40,
            "contract": 30,
            "remote": 10
        },
        "industries": ["tech", "finance", "healthcare", "education", "marketing"],
        "salary_ranges": "30k-200k",
        "includes_applications": True,
        "test_applications": 850
    },
    "test_skills": {
        "fixture_file": "test_skills.json",
        "source": "./fixtures/test_skills.json",
        "destination": "web:/app/fixtures/test_skills.json",
        "records": 150,
        "skill_categories": {
            "programming": 60,
            "design": 25,
            "management": 20,
            "data_science": 25,
            "marketing": 20
        },
        "proficiency_levels": ["beginner", "intermediate", "advanced", "expert"],
        "includes_certifications": True,
        "test_certifications": 320
    },
    "test_authors": {
        "fixture_file": "test_authors.json",
        "source": "./fixtures/test_authors.json",
        "destination": "web:/app/fixtures/test_authors.json",
        "records": 40,
        "expertise_levels": {
            "junior": 10,
            "mid_level": 15,
            "senior": 10,
            "expert": 5
        },
        "specializations": ["full_stack", "frontend", "backend", "mobile", "devops"],
        "includes_portfolios": True,
        "portfolio_projects": 180
    },
    "test_locations": {
        "fixture_file": "test_locations.json",
        "source": "./fixtures/test_locations.json",
        "destination": "web:/app/fixtures/test_locations.json",
        "records": 100,
        "location_types": {
            "city": 60,
            "remote": 20,
            "hybrid": 15,
            "international": 5
        },
        "geographic_coverage": ["North America", "Europe", "Asia", "Remote"],
        "includes_geodata": True
    }
}

# Mock configurations injected
mock_configurations = {
    "settings_test": {
        "source": "./test_config/settings_test.py",
        "destination": "web:/app/anihpj/settings/test.py",
        "modifications": {
            "DEBUG": True,
            "ALLOWED_HOSTS": ["*"],
            "DATABASE": "sqlite_in_memory",
            "CACHES": "dummy_cache_backend",
            "EMAIL_BACKEND": "console",
            "CELERY_TASK_ALWAYS_EAGER": True
        },
        "purpose": "isolated_testing_environment"
    },
    "test_media_files": {
        "sample_avatars": {
            "source": "./test_media/sample_avatars/",
            "destination": "web:/app/media/avatars/",
            "files": 50,
            "formats": ["jpg", "png"],
            "size": "25MB"
        },
        "sample_portfolios": {
            "source": "./test_media/sample_portfolios/",
            "destination": "web:/app/media/portfolios/",
            "files": 120,
            "formats": ["jpg", "png", "pdf"],
            "size": "85MB"
        },
        "sample_certifications": {
            "source": "./test_media/sample_certifications/",
            "destination": "web:/app/media/certifications/",
            "files": 80,
            "formats": ["pdf"],
            "size": "42MB"
        }
    }
}

# Test data loading results
loading_results = {
    "fixtures_loaded": {
        "test_users": {
            "loaded": 50,
            "load_time": "1.2s",
            "status": "success"
        },
        "test_jobposts": {
            "loaded": 200,
            "load_time": "3.8s",
            "status": "success",
            "related_applications": 850
        },
        "test_skills": {
            "loaded": 150,
            "load_time": "2.1s",
            "status": "success",
            "related_certifications": 320
        },
        "test_authors": {
            "loaded": 40,
            "load_time": "1.5s",
            "status": "success",
            "related_portfolios": 180
        },
        "test_locations": {
            "loaded": 100,
            "load_time": "1.9s",
            "status": "success"
        }
    },
    "total_load_time": "10.5s",
    "database_size": "245MB"
}

# Testing workflow enabled
testing_capabilities = {
    "User_model_testing": [
        "Authentication flows",
        "Permission systems",
        "Profile management",
        "Session handling",
        "Password reset workflows"
    ],
    "JobPost_model_testing": [
        "Job search and filtering",
        "Application submission",
        "Job recommendations",
        "Analytics tracking",
        "Status workflows"
    ],
    "Skills_model_testing": [
        "Skill verification",
        "Certification validation",
        "Demand analysis",
        "Proficiency calculations",
        "Endorsement systems"
    ],
    "Author_model_testing": [
        "Portfolio display",
        "Project management",
        "Rating systems",
        "Availability tracking",
        "Expertise validation"
    ],
    "Location_model_testing": [
        "Geographic search",
        "Radius calculations",
        "Market analytics",
        "Remote work filtering",
        "Geocoding accuracy"
    ]
}

# Print test injection summary
print("Django Development Testing - Rapid Prototyping Data Injection:")
print("=" * 65)
print(f"Test Session: {test_injection['test_session_id']}")
print(f"Purpose: {test_injection['purpose'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")

print(f"\n📦 Test Fixtures Injected:")
for fixture_name, details in injected_fixtures.items():
    print(f"   • {fixture_name.replace('_', ' ').title()}:")
    print(f"      File: {details['fixture_file']}")
    print(f"      Records: {details['records']}")

print(f"\n⚙️ Mock Configurations:")
print(f"   Settings: {mock_configurations['settings_test']['source']}")
print(f"   Modifications: {len(mock_configurations['settings_test']['modifications'])} settings updated")

print(f"\n📁 Test Media Files:")
for media_type, details in mock_configurations['test_media_files'].items():
    print(f"   • {media_type.replace('_', ' ').title()}:")
    print(f"      Files: {details['files']} | Size: {details['size']}")

print(f"\n✅ Loading Results:")
total_records = sum(details['loaded'] for details in loading_results['fixtures_loaded'].values())
print(f"   Total Records Loaded: {total_records}")
print(f"   Total Load Time: {loading_results['total_load_time']}")
print(f"   Database Size: {loading_results['database_size']}")

print(f"\n🧪 Testing Capabilities Enabled:")
for model, capabilities in testing_capabilities.items():
    print(f"   {model.replace('_', ' ')}:")
    for capability in capabilities[:3]:  # Show first 3
        print(f"      • {capability}")

print(f"\n🚀 Rapid Prototyping Summary:")
print(f"   📦 5 test fixtures loaded (540 records)")
print(f"   📁 3 media directories injected (250 files, 152MB)")
print(f"   ⚙️ Test configuration applied")
print(f"   🧪 All 5 Django models ready for testing")
print(f"   ⚡ Total injection time: 10.5s")
print(f"   ✨ Development environment ready for integration testing")

Example 5: Container-to-Container File Transfer (Multi-Service Data Sync)

Transfer files between different Django service containers for data synchronization workflows - sharing User session data, JobPost search indexes, Skills verification caches, Author portfolio thumbnails, and Location geodata between web servers, worker nodes, and cache services.

# Copy search indexes from web to worker
docker compose cp web:/app/search_indexes/ ./temp_indexes/
docker compose cp ./temp_indexes/ worker:/app/search_indexes/

# Sync cache data between Redis instances
docker compose cp redis:/data/dump.rdb ./temp_redis/
docker compose cp ./temp_redis/dump.rdb redis-backup:/data/

# Transfer generated reports between services
docker compose cp worker:/app/reports/generated/ ./temp_reports/
docker compose cp ./temp_reports/ web:/app/static/reports/

# Copy processed media between containers
docker compose cp worker:/app/media/processed/ ./temp_processed/
docker compose cp ./temp_processed/ web:/app/media/processed/

# Sync configuration between environments
docker compose cp web:/app/config/runtime.json ./temp_config/
docker compose cp ./temp_config/runtime.json worker:/app/config/

Django Models Context & Multi-Service Sync:

# Multi-service data synchronization for Django anihpj
# Syncing data across services: User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location

from datetime import datetime
from typing import Dict, List, Any

# Data synchronization context
sync_operation = {
    "sync_id": "MULTI_SERVICE_SYNC_2026_01_12_001",
    "sync_time": "2026-01-12 10:00:00",
    "sync_type": "scheduled_data_synchronization",
    "services_involved": ["web", "worker", "redis", "nginx"],
    "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"]
}

# File transfer operations
transfer_operations = {
    "search_indexes_sync": {
        "source_service": "web",
        "destination_service": "worker",
        "source_path": "/app/search_indexes/",
        "temp_path": "./temp_indexes/",
        "destination_path": "/app/search_indexes/",
        "purpose": "jobpost_and_skills_search_optimization",
        "models": ["JobPost", "Skills", "Location"],
        "data_transferred": {
            "jobpost_index": {
                "file": "jobpost_elasticsearch_index.dat",
                "size": "3.2GB",
                "records_indexed": 123456,
                "last_update": "2026-01-12 09:45:00"
            },
            "skills_index": {
                "file": "skills_search_index.dat",
                "size": "456MB",
                "records_indexed": 8976,
                "last_update": "2026-01-12 09:50:00"
            },
            "location_geodata": {
                "file": "location_spatial_index.dat",
                "size": "234MB",
                "records_indexed": 34567,
                "last_update": "2026-01-12 09:55:00"
            }
        },
        "transfer_time": "8m 23s",
        "integrity_verified": True
    },
    "redis_cache_backup": {
        "source_service": "redis",
        "destination_service": "redis-backup",
        "source_path": "/data/dump.rdb",
        "temp_path": "./temp_redis/dump.rdb",
        "destination_path": "/data/dump.rdb",
        "purpose": "cache_data_redundancy",
        "models": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "cache_data": {
            "user_sessions": {
                "keys": 45678,
                "size": "234MB",
                "ttl_average": "1800s"
            },
            "jobpost_listings": {
                "keys": 23456,
                "size": "567MB",
                "ttl_average": "3600s"
            },
            "skills_cache": {
                "keys": 8976,
                "size": "123MB",
                "ttl_average": "7200s"
            },
            "author_profiles": {
                "keys": 5432,
                "size": "189MB",
                "ttl_average": "1800s"
            },
            "location_data": {
                "keys": 12345,
                "size": "345MB",
                "ttl_average": "14400s"
            }
        },
        "total_cache_size": "1.5GB",
        "transfer_time": "3m 45s",
        "integrity_verified": True
    },
    "generated_reports_sync": {
        "source_service": "worker",
        "destination_service": "web",
        "source_path": "/app/reports/generated/",
        "temp_path": "./temp_reports/",
        "destination_path": "/app/static/reports/",
        "purpose": "report_availability_for_download",
        "models": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "reports_transferred": {
            "user_activity_report": {
                "file": "user_activity_2026_01.pdf",
                "size": "23MB",
                "pages": 456,
                "generation_time": "5m 23s"
            },
            "jobpost_analytics": {
                "file": "jobpost_analytics_2026_01.pdf",
                "size": "67MB",
                "pages": 1234,
                "charts": 89
            },
            "skills_demand_analysis": {
                "file": "skills_demand_2026_q1.pdf",
                "size": "34MB",
                "pages": 678,
                "charts": 56
            },
            "author_performance": {
                "file": "author_performance_2026_01.pdf",
                "size": "12MB",
                "pages": 234,
                "charts": 34
            },
            "location_market_trends": {
                "file": "location_trends_2026_q1.pdf",
                "size": "45MB",
                "pages": 890,
                "charts": 78
            }
        },
        "total_reports": 5,
        "total_size": "181MB",
        "transfer_time": "2m 12s"
    },
    "processed_media_sync": {
        "source_service": "worker",
        "destination_service": "web",
        "source_path": "/app/media/processed/",
        "temp_path": "./temp_processed/",

        "total_files": 1924,

        "destination_service": "worker",
        "source_path": "/app/config/runtime.json",
        "temp_path": "./temp_config/runtime.json",
        "destination_path": "/app/config/runtime.json",
        "purpose": "runtime_configuration_consistency",
        "models": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "config_sections": [
            "model_cache_settings",
            "api_rate_limits",
            "search_parameters",

        "transfer_time": "0.8s"
    }
}

# Synchronization results

    "total_operations": 5,
    "successful_transfers": 5,
    "failed_transfers": 0,
    "total_data_transferred": "6.9GB",
    "total_files_transferred": 1934,
    "total_sync_time": "27m 17s",
    "services_synchronized": ["web", "worker", "redis", "redis-backup", "nginx"],
    "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"]
}

# Service consistency verification
consistency_verification = {
    "web_worker_consistency": {
        "search_indexes": "synchronized",
        "configuration": "synchronized",
        "reports_available": True,
        "media_updated": True
    },
    "redis_backup_consistency": {
        "cache_data": "synchronized",
        "user_sessions": "backed_up",
        "model_caches": "redundant"
    },
    "overall_consistency": "achieved",
    "verification_time": "1m 45s"
}

# Print multi-service synchronization summary
print("Django Multi-Service Data Synchronization - Container File Transfer:")
print("=" * 70)
print(f"Sync ID: {sync_operation['sync_id']}")
print(f"Sync Time: {sync_operation['sync_time']}")
print(f"Services: {', '.join(sync_operation['services_involved'])}")

print(f"\n📂 File Transfer Operations:")

print(f"\n   1. Search Indexes Sync (Web → Worker):")
print(f"      Purpose: {transfer_operations['search_indexes_sync']['purpose'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
print(f"      Models: {', '.join(transfer_operations['search_indexes_sync']['models'])}")
for index_name, details in transfer_operations['search_indexes_sync']['data_transferred'].items():
    print(f"      • {index_name.replace('_', ' ').title()}: {details['size']} ({details['records_indexed']:,} records)")
print(f"      Transfer Time: {transfer_operations['search_indexes_sync']['transfer_time']}")

print(f"\n   2. Redis Cache Backup (Redis → Redis-Backup):")
print(f"      Total Cache Size: {transfer_operations['redis_cache_backup']['total_cache_size']}")
for cache_type, details in transfer_operations['redis_cache_backup']['cache_data'].items():
    print(f"      • {cache_type.replace('_', ' ').title()}: {details['keys']:,} keys, {details['size']}")
print(f"      Transfer Time: {transfer_operations['redis_cache_backup']['transfer_time']}")

print(f"\n   3. Generated Reports (Worker → Web):")
print(f"      Reports: {transfer_operations['generated_reports_sync']['total_reports']}")
print(f"      Total Size: {transfer_operations['generated_reports_sync']['total_size']}")
for report_name, details in transfer_operations['generated_reports_sync']['reports_transferred'].items():
    print(f"      • {report_name.replace('_', ' ').title()}: {details['size']}")
print(f"      Transfer Time: {transfer_operations['generated_reports_sync']['transfer_time']}")

print(f"\n   4. Processed Media (Worker → Web):")
print(f"      Total Files: {transfer_operations['processed_media_sync']['total_files']}")
print(f"      Total Size: {transfer_operations['processed_media_sync']['total_size']}")
for media_type, details in transfer_operations['processed_media_sync']['processed_media'].items():
    print(f"      • {media_type.replace('_', ' ').title()}:")
    print(f"         Files: {details['files']} | Compression: {details['compression_ratio']}")
print(f"      Transfer Time: {transfer_operations['processed_media_sync']['transfer_time']}")

print(f"\n   5. Configuration Sync (Web → Worker):")
print(f"      File: runtime.json ({transfer_operations['configuration_sync']['file_size']})")
print(f"      Sections: {len(transfer_operations['configuration_sync']['config_sections'])}")
print(f"      Transfer Time: {transfer_operations['configuration_sync']['transfer_time']}")

print(f"\n📊 Synchronization Results:")
print(f"   Total Operations: {sync_results['total_operations']}")
print(f"   Successful: {sync_results['successful_transfers']}")
print(f"   Failed: {sync_results['failed_transfers']}")
print(f"   Data Transferred: {sync_results['total_data_transferred']}")
print(f"   Files Transferred: {sync_results['total_files_transferred']:,}")
print(f"   Total Time: {sync_results['total_sync_time']}")

print(f"\n✅ Consistency Verification:")
print(f"   Web ↔ Worker: {consistency_verification['web_worker_consistency']['search_indexes'].upper()}")
print(f"   Redis ↔ Backup: {consistency_verification['redis_backup_consistency']['cache_data'].upper()}")
print(f"   Overall: {consistency_verification['overall_consistency'].upper()}")

print(f"\n🚀 Multi-Service Sync Summary:")
print(f"   📂 5 transfer operations completed")
print(f"   💾 6.9GB data synchronized across services")
print(f"   📁 1,934 files transferred")
print(f"   🔄 All 5 Django models data consistent")
print(f"   ✅ Service redundancy established")
print(f"   ⚡ Total sync time: 27m 17s")
print(f"   ✨ Multi-service architecture synchronized")
